about.title: About Company
about.desc: We create and maintain our own technology products and automation systems. Our solutions are used for testing and verifying various online services.
about.desc2: We are constantly developing and looking for talented specialists who want to solve complex tasks and grow with us.

requirements.title: Requirements
items: Ability to independently solve technical tasks

items.a: Salary depends on your experience and skills. We offer a competitive salary.
We offer a flexible schedule. You determine the convenient time for work yourself.
Yes, we are looking for specialists with experience in automation and web technologies.

items.q: How does the hiring process work?
items.a: The process consists of 4 stages: application, conversation, technical task, and offer.
Yes, the work is fully remote. You can work from anywhere in the world.
